name: Umred Road
metaTitle: Property in Umred Road Nagpur | NMRDA Approved Plots | Mahalaxmi Infra
metaDescription: Buy NMRDA sanctioned, RERA approved plots in Umred Road Nagpur. Starting ₹22 Lakh. Up to 90% bank finance. Contact Mahalaxmi Infra today.
heroSubheading: Affordable Plots on Nagpur's Eastern Corridor
introduction: Umred Road is an important arterial road in Nagpur connecting the city to the Umred region. The corridor has seen growing residential development in recent years as land prices in more central areas have risen. Umred Road offers buyers affordable plot options with good connectivity to central Nagpur and industrial zones. Mahalaxmi Infra's Mahalaxmi Nagar 46 project is located in Mouza Pandhurna on Umred Road, offering NMRDA sanctioned and RERA approved plots. The area is well-suited for buyers looking for budget-friendly options with future appreciation potential as Nagpur's eastern zones continue to develop.
whyInvest: Affordable plot prices on eastern corridor
